titleStmt.title: SII 27.362: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 362. (A.R. No. 537 of 1929-30.) BAINDŪRU, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the courtyard of a private house near the Local Fund Dispensary.
The is dated Śaka 1371, Śukla, Chaitra śu. 10, Thursday corresponding to 1449 A.D., April 2, the weekday being, however, Wednesday. This date is identical with that of No. 536/29-30 above.
It records a gift of lands to god Pārśvanātha-tīrthaṅkara of Baidūr by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Indagarasa-oḍeya, son of Saṅgirāya-oḍeya, who was governing Hāḍuvaḷi-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: This is engraved in continuation of No. 140 about.
div.p:
svastiśrī vijayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1331 ne varttamāna śuklasaṁvatsarada caitra śu 10 guruvāradalu śrīmatu
svastiśrī manmahāmaṁḍalēśvara saṁgirāya Oḍeyara kumāra Iṁdagarasa Oḍeyaru hāḍavaḷiya rājyavanu pratipālisuva kā
ladalū baidūra pārśvanāthaṁge viniyōgakke biṭṭibāḷu gaṁgaranāḍoḷagāda pūrvada kimmakkiya haraveyyali 13 mūḍe gaddeyanū
dhārāpūrvakavāgi Eṟadukoṭṭa bāḷina catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu kallamane Iṁdaṁ paḍuva teṁka Āraveya baḷiyiṁdaṁ ba
ḍaga paḍuva nāḍagaḍiya Ārave Iṁdaṁ mūḍa baḍaga kaṭṭaṇada haliṁdaṁ teṁkapaḍuva gōpunāyakana ĀraveIṁdaṁ mūḍe ki
mmakkiya taṁmanāyakana bāḷiṁdaṁ paḍuva bījavari gaddehāni 50 . mūḍataḷi Iṁdaṁ paḍuva teṁkanāḍa bageya harava
riya dhareiṁdaṁ baḍaga paḍuva masakalla koḍigeIṁda mūḍa guṁḍavanabāḷa dhareIṁdaṁ teṁkagadde hāni 50 . rāmaṇa
dhareya baḷiya veṁṭadoḷagāgi mūḍaṇagaḍi hebbāra vṛttiya bāḷiṁdaṁ paḍuva baḍaga gōpunāyakana bāḷige nīru hariva
tōḍiṁdaṁ teṁka paḍuva kammāṟakoḍage Iṁdaṁ mūḍa teṁka masakalla gaddeyiṁdaṁ baḍaga paḍuva guṁmanakāniṁda mūḍa
teṁginatāriṁda paḍuḍa(va) baḍaga hattala makki Iṁdaṁ teṁka Iṁtī catussīmeya Oḷaguḷa 12 mūḍe gadde Oḷaguḷa maki
maragaḍi nidhi ni nidhāna nidhinikṣēpavanu baidūra pārśvanāthage Iṁdugoḍeyaru dhārāpūrvvakadiṁ dhāre Eṟadu koṭṭa bāḷu ©
holanelaThere is a blank space after

baḷiya haḷada paḍuvaṇa
catussīmeya vivara mūḍalū gāyatri
dīvi maṭhada śrīpādaṁgaḷa bāḷiṁda paḍuvalū teṁkalu
dēvasvada gadeIṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu baṁkēśvara dēvara dē
vasva gāyatrīmaṭhada śrīpādaṁgaḷa bāḷiṁda mūḍalu baḍagalu gāyatri
maṭhada śrīpādaṁgaḷa bāḷiṁdaṁ teṁkalu Iṁtī catussīmeya Oḷagu
ḷaga de hāne 50 ḷiyana gade Ayivattu hāne gadeya catussīmeya
vivara mūḍalu halara baṁḍakalliṁda gaḍiiṁdaṁ paḍuvalū teṁkalu ba
Āḷuvittiya bāḷagaḍiIṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu nirāḷa dēvana keṟeya
Iṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu halaragaḍi Iṁda teṁkalu Iṁtī catussīmeya Oḷagu
dde hāne 53 lekkada mūḍe 1 bemmakka seṭṭitti dharṁmmakke biṭṭa Ippattuhāne gaddeya ca
tu ssīmeya vivara . mūḍalu halara tōḍina gaḍi Iṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu beṁmmakka seṭṭittiya
gaḍiIṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu beṁmmakka seṭṭittiya gaḍiIṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu riya
ṭṭa bāḷiṁdaṁ teṁkalu Iṁtī catussīmeya Oḷaguḷa gadde mānyaṁ māneya seṭiya gadde keṟiya
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baṁkēsvara dēvara mallappasēna bōvara gaḍiIṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu
gāvaṇiya baḷiya gaḍiIṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu celuva vīraṁṇaseṭṭiya bāḷagaḍiIṁdaṁ
mūḍalu baḍagalu hāneya keṟeIṁdaṁ teṁkalu Iṁtī catussīmeya Oḷaguḷa koḍigi
bāgila gadde . hāni 50 gaddeya catussīmeya vivara . mūḍalu toḍiṁpaḍuvalu teṁkalu
holeya baḷiya dugaṁṇa nāyakana gaḍiIṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu beṁmakka Āḷuvrittiya gaḍiIṁ
da mūḍalu baḍagalu keṟeIṁdaṁ teṁkalu . Iṁtī catussīmeya Oḷaguḷḷa gaddehāne 50 [.] baḷiragadde I
hānegaddeya catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu kōṭi taṁmmiseṭṭiyara maṭhada bāḷiṁda paḍuvalu . teṁ
kalu taṁgiyakka seṭṭittiya gaḍiIṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu taṁgiyakka seṭṭittiya gaḍiIṁda mūḍa
baḍagalu kōṭi taṁma seṭṭiyara maṭhada bāḷiṁda teṁkalu Iṁtī catusīmeya Oḷaguḷa gaddehāne 20 . gō
pīnātha dēvarabāḷiṁda mūḍalu gāvaṇi baḷiyara gōpiseṭṭiya bāḷiṁda mūḍalu baḍagalu beṁmmakka se
ṭṭittiya bāḷiṁda teṁka beṁmakka Āḷuvittiya bāḷiṁda paḍuva baṁkēsvara dēvara dēvasvadapaḍuvateṁka gō
pīnātha dēvara dēvasvadabaḍagalu Iṁtī catusīmeya Oḷaguḷa Eraḍugadde hāni 50 . mūḍakuṁḍala va
riseṭṭiya bāḷiṁda paḍuva beṁmmakka Āḷuvittiya bāḷiṁda paḍuvalu puruseṭṭiya bāḷiṁda mūḍa hiriya
beṁmaṁṇaseṭṭiya bāḷiṁda teṁka gōpīnātha dēvara dēvasvada bāḷiṁda baḍagalu Iṁtī catussīmeya
Oḷaguḷagadde Ippattuhāni koṟate Aivattu hānigadde mūḍe 4 . mūḍapura seṭṭiya bāḷiṁda paḍuva paḍuva
lu jagadārādhyara dēvasvada mūḍe baḍaga jagadārādhyara dēvasvada bāḷiṁda teṁka teṁkalu jagadārā
dhyara dēvasvada hittiliṁda baḍagalu Iṁtī catussīmeya Oḷaguḷa Eraḍu gaddehāni 50 . mūḍalu jagadā
rādhyara dēvasvada paḍuvalu jagadārādhyara dēvasvada bāḷiṁda mūḍalu baḍaga jagadā
rādhyara dēvasvada teṁkalu jagadārādhyara dēvasvada baḍagalu Iṁtī catusīmeya
Oḷaguḷa gaddehāne 30 . hiriya beṁmaṁṇaseṭiya bāḷiṁda paḍuvalu baḍaga ha
lara bageya Eṇṇeya bāḷinda teṁkalu paḍuvalu halara bageya Eṁṇeya
bāḷiṁda mūḍalu jagadārādhyara dēvasvada mūḍalu gōpīnātha dēvara dēvasva
da bāḷiṁda mūḍalu teṁkalu puruseṭṭiya bāḷiṁda baḍagalu Iṁtī catusīmeya Oḷagu
(gu)ḷa gadeya Ayivaṁḍe mūḍe 5 paricitanija parasamaya kusumasara maḍahara kupi
tagirīśaṁ vāgīśaṁ vinutanutīśaṁ samudita guṇagaṇa gatamaḷasu carita vidaḷita mēghani
vāsaṁ gatahāsaṁ nirmaḷabhāśaṁ kabijana nuti śatamukharita gurutara mahima ni
dhānaṁ paridhānaṁ mutti nidhānaṁ praṇamata lakṣumi sēnapraya śṛtaghana maḍivāḍi mṛgēṁdraṁ
ta caṁdraṁ caṁdramunīṁdraṁ . Aṁtu baidūra pāriśvatīrtthaṁkararige Amṛpaḍige biṭṭa
bāḷu baidūra catusīmeya Oḷaguḷa gadde bittu mūḍe 18 gadde 30 . śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.362 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
